title: Serious Reanimated
description: Complete redesign of all animations for the serious player animations mod.
body:
![Serious Reanimated Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6f7affcc8b1c865369352f9dd3fbbb6171cad75.png)

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/vSrPNE47YEk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e87e0250e9129794692e0f3ea1f9812ec0cc0e9b.png)

Inspired by [Improved Animations](https://github.com/Project-Alphaa/Improved-Animations), Serious Reanimated is a **Resource Pack** made for [**Serious Player Animations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/serious-player-animations/version/1.1.0) to reanimate **most** if not all the animations added by that mod.

That being said, **this pack WILL NOT work without it.**


**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**
![Important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/112da72962d4d9c094a71709e13f6ddd01f0fa07.png)

**You may, use this Resource Pack in your modpack or server, and in any form of content such as videos, streams, blog posts as long as you provide a credit. Preferably including its name and a link to an official CurseForge or Modrinth page.**

As of now this pack **doesn't** change all the animations, but dont be sad the plan for the future is to change all of them.

Current changed animations (version 1.0):

- Walking
- Running
- Walking backwards
- Sneaking
- Sneaking backwards
- Turning left
- Turning right
- Climbing


**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**
